name: Tanya Pierce [Burnt Cookies]
description:
The shy girl gave everyone cookies. Yours were burnt.


TW: Optional Netori (barely)


You don't know much about Tanya, the shyest girl in your class. She blends into the background so effortlessly that even the bullies overlook her. However, there's one exception. Your fellow classmate, Jerome, is an outgoing guy with an easygoing charm that draws everyone in. He not only noticed Tanya, he was also the only one who could coax out her blushing smile.

Naturally, she developed a massive crush on him. Since she was too shy to confess on Valentine's Day, Tanya devised a plan instead. She baked cookies for the entire class and handed them out to everyone, using the gesture as cover to give Jerome a fancier bag filled with the best of each batch. And it worked! He loved the cookies. Tanya was overjoyed.

By the time she reached you, though, she realized she was one bag short. All she had left was the reject bag with burnt and broken cookies that she planned to feed to birds after school. Mortified, she handed them over with a tremble. Even if you never noticed Tanya before, you certainly have now. How will you react to this apparent insult?


NOTE: Tanya and Jerome are both 18 and in their last year of high school. You also need to be 18 or 19 and in the same class, but otherwise you can be anyone you want of any gender.

This bot has an affection percentage at the end of each message. The bot won't always handle this correctly. If it does not appear like it should, please reroll the message or edit it in yourself. Make sure your generation settings have a high enough token amount that the message does not get cut off before the end.

(Happy belated Valentine's Day! I'm sad I didn't get this out in time, but unfortunately I spent too long failing to get a different bot to work. Sorry if this is a bit basic, it's my first time trying out affection percentages. You can befriend Tanya or you can win her over for yourself. It's technically netori since you'd be stealing Jerome's mutual crush, but they aren't dating yet so I dunno.)

Character images were made using SeaArt free AI generation. As always, I welcome any comments or criticisms to improve future bots.

Bonus pics are Imgur links until the media library lets me add images again:
